name: intelligent-invoicing
description: AI-powered invoice processing workflow with natural language interaction

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:n8n"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy:infrastructure

author: Intelligent Invoicing Team
